title: Implement alias resolution and structuralChildIndex in Tree/TreeCursor
description:
Two related gaps found in wcu.1 review (commit 1b4e4e6):

1. tree.go nodeFromChildSubtree (lines 493-496) has alias lookup stubbed out. Needs to track child index and look up alias_sequence for the production to return correct aliased symbol/type names.

2. tree_cursor.go TreeCursorEntry.structuralChildIndex is always 0. This index is needed for field_map lookups (field map entries reference children by structural index). Must be computed during GotoFirstChild/GotoNextSibling.

Both are needed together for correct alias and field resolution. Should be done before GLR parser integration tests that exercise aliased grammars.
